name: Goliath: Playing with Reality
summary:
UPDATE 🚀
Impulse, Playing with Reality, the second instalment of the Playing with Reality collection, is available to download from 12 September, 2024. 

Winner of Venice Achievement Prize at the 81st Venice International Film Festival (2024), Impulse is a 40-minute interactive mixed reality documentary about ADHD, and how you make sense of the world around you, told through the stories of four people who are coming to terms with the decisions which have chartered their...
